page.content: In the analysis of the shivering score, Group A (n = 40) reported a score of 0 with 27 (68%) participants, while Group P (n = 40) had 17 (43%) at the same score. For a shivering score of 1, Group A had 3 (8%) and Group P had 1 (3%). At a score of 2, Group A recorded 7 (19%) and Group P reported 9 (23%). For a score of 3, Group A had 2 (5%) versus 3 (8%) in Group P. Finally, at a score of 4, Group A recorded 1 (3%)* while Group P had 10 (25%). Transitioning to Table 2, the BMD (g/cm3) values show ZA with Non-PE at .7228/.1022 and PE at .7457/.0825, while for Vehicle, Non-PE is at .3760/.0621 and PE at .5312/.0779. The BV/TV (%) for ZA with Non-PE is 79.0763/13.4511 and PE is 77.3756/6.8013, while Vehicle shows Non-PE at 61.1034/7.2136 and PE at 61.2206/7.6028. Tb.Th (mm) values are .0945/.0106 for ZA Non-PE and .0917/.0083 for PE, while Vehicle shows .0858/.0066 for Non-PE and .0868/.0079 for PE. Tb.Sp (mm) for ZA Non-PE is .5980/.0227 and .0634/.0128 for PE, while Vehicle shows .0644/.0115 for Non-PE and .0758/.0072 for PE. Finally, Tb.N (1/mm) values for ZA are 18.65/9.922 for Non-PE and 20.90/9.527 for PE, while Vehicle shows 35.60/18.155 for Non-PE and 40.20/14.793 for PE.
